items.hook: ‘Colony’ director Yeon Sang-ho talks sequel plans through novel, video game
items.body: EXCLUSIVE: The film has proved a box office hit in South Korea and is set for a US release on August 28.

items.hook: The Red Mouth by Sheila Armstrong review – profound exploration of Ireland’s deep time
items.body:
Sinister bogland discoveries haunt the intersecting lives of four characters in this meditative, exquisitely written tale

Almost 14% of Ireland is bog: vast swathes of moss-carpeted land, below which layers of ancient history have

items.hook: Seryozha is a short novel by Soviet writer Vera Panova.
items.body: Seryozha has also been translated as Time Walked and A Summer to Remember. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Cousin Bette is a 1998 British–American comedy-drama film starring Jessica Lange in the title role and is loosely based on the novel of the same name by the French author Honoré de Balzac.
items.body: Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Using AI for creative pursuits? Moderation is key
items.body: An experiment showed AI users had the most creative ideas when they used it in moderation – not too much and not too little. Columnist David Robson puts the finding to the test, and explores what we lose when we over-rely on AI

items.hook: Bruno Mars has an unexpected opening before Wembley party starts
items.body: After an eight-year absence from UK stages, Bruno Mars returned to Wembley Stadium with a polished, hit-filled show.

items.hook: Bayeux Tapestry in 'wonderful state' after journey to London, French minister says
items.body: The French culture minister has told the BBC that the Bayeux Tapestry is in "a wonderful state".

items.hook: Angel Heart is a 1987 neo-noir psychological horror film, an adaptation of William Hjortsberg's 1978 novel Falling Angel.
items.body: The film is written and directed by Alan Parker, and stars Mickey Rourke, Robert De Niro, Lisa Bonet and Charlotte Rampling. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.opener: Here's one for the group chat —
items.hook: Vararuci is a name associated with several literary and scientific texts in Sanskrit and also with various legends in several parts of India.
items.body: This Vararuci is often identified with Kātyāyana. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: ESA’s Mars Express meets NASA’s Psyche
Brenda Fricker, Oscar winner for My Left Foot, dies aged 81
items.body:
The acclaimed Irish actor started her career in Coronation Street and Casualty before a string of high-profile Hollywood roles

items.hook: Ardhanarishwar is a Hindi novel by Indian writer Vishnu Prabhakar, published in 1992.
items.body: It won the 1993 Sahitya Akademi Award for Hindi, given by Sahitya Akademi, India's National Academy of Letters. One of those things you can't un-know.
